titleStmt.title: SII 24.483: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 483. (A.R. No. 374 of 1953-54.) IV PRĀKĀRA, SOUTH WALL, PROPER RIGHT OF THE ĀRYABHAṬṬĀḶ-VĀŚAL.

summary.p: Records a grant of 1(3/8) vēli of land at Vikkiramaṅgalam as tiruviḍaiyāṭṭam and assessed to yield 18 poṉ per annum, towards provisions for the deities halt at Ammaiyār-pandal in Tirumuḍikkuṟai en route to Guhapriyam and offerings to the god on the 3rd day's festivities of the Ādi-Brahmā festival, by Kōnēṭi Ōbaḷarāja of the lunar race and Ātrēya-gōtra, and hailing from the north (Uttaradēśam). The details of the date viz. Śaka 1486, Raktākshi, Dhanus śu. 5 Friday, Aviṭṭam correspond to 1564 A.D., December 8, Friday, ·68; ·45.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . svastiśrīman mahāmaṇḍaleśvaran rājādhirāja rājaparameśvaran śrīvira pratāpa śrīvira
sadāśivarāyamahārāyat prithivīrājyam paṇṇi Aruḷāniṉṟa śakāpdam 1000 4 100 8 10 6 Itaṉmel
cellā niṉṟa rattākṣisamvatsarattu dhanunāyaṟṟu pūrvapakṣattu pañcamiyum śukravāramum
peṟṟa Aviṭṭa nakṣatrattunāḷ teṉkarai pāṇṭiyakulapati vaḷanāṭṭu viḻāvaṟā vitivaḷa
nāṭṭut tiruvaraṅkan tiruppati perumāḷ śrīraṅganāthadevar śrībhaṇṭārattukku Uttara tecam
somakulatilakarāṉa Ātraiyagotrattuk koṉeṭi Opaḷarājāveṉ teṇṭaṉ samarppittu
poliyūṭṭu ccilāśāsanam paṇṇikkuṭuttapaṭi perumāḷ śrīraṅganāthadevaṟku Eṉṉuṭaiya
Ibhayamāka Ammaiyār pantalukku Eḻuntaruḷi Amutu ceytaruḷum kaṭṭaḷaippaṭikku tiruviṭaiyāṭṭa
mākak koṇṭu cetta teṉkarai rājagambhīra vaḷanāṭṭu Uṟaiyūr kūṟṟattu mel palāṟṟu vikkaramaṅkala
grāmattil koṇṭu cetta rūpāy 1(1/4) 2 10 4 kku Irekaippaṭi poṉ 10 8kku perumāḷ śrīraṅganāthadevar Āti
brahmāvin tirunāḷ muṉṟāntirunāḷ śrīkukapriyattukku Eḻuntaruḷukiṟa potu Eṉ ṉuṭaiya Ubhaya
māka tirumuṭikkuṟaiyil Ammaiyār pantalukku Eḻuntaruḷi Amutu ceytaruḷum Appam 100 kku pon_ kū 6¥
Atirasam 100-kku pon_ 1 U 6 Iṭṭili 3 100-kku pon_ 1u 8¥ tocai 3 100-kku pon_ 2 U 4 cemattaḷikaiy 10 2 kku pon_ 6¥
cantaṉam paṭi kku pon_ 1¥ Aṭaikkāyamutu Ilaiyamutu ci U 3¥ camaittu Eṭukkiṟa per kūli kku poṉ 3
Āka poṉ 10 8 Āka Inta poṉ patineṭṭukkum ko kiramaṅkālil nilam Oṉṟekāle
araikkāl nilattukkup paṇṇikkoṇṭa śāsanamum śrīpaṇṭārattile samarppittut tiruviṭai
yāṭṭam Inta nilattil Utaiyam koṇṭe Intap poli yūṭṭukkaṭṭa
ḷai candrādityavaraiyum naṭakkak kaṭavatākavum Itukaḷukku varum viṭṭavaṉ viḻukkāṭu Uṇṭāṉatu Ekāṅki
patmanābhayaṉ peṟṟu varak kaṭavatākavum . dānapālanayormmadhye dānāt śreyo nupālanam . dānāt svarga
makhāpnoti pālanādaccutam padam . Ippaṭikku Intap poliyūṭṭur cilāśāsanam Eḻutiṉamaikku koyil
kaṇakku śrīraṅganārāyaṇapriyan Eḻuttu .§
Digital edition of SII 24.483 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
